name: smooth
usage: General view transitions and state changes

name: snappy
usage: Quick confirmatory actions and feedback

name: bouncy
usage: Playful delightful interactions

name: interactive
usage: Gesture-driven real-time following

name: button-press
usage: Button tap scale feedback

name: card-expansion
usage: Card expanding to detail view

name: sheet-presentation
usage: Sheet and modal show and hide

name: keyboard
usage: Layout adjustment when keyboard appears

name: default-balanced
usage: General purpose balanced spring

name: dramatic
usage: Slow modal or hero transitions

name: web-ease
usage: Standard cubic-bezier(0.25 0.1 0.25 1) ease

name: web-scroll-reveal
usage: Fade and translateY on scroll into viewport

name: hero-stagger-entrance
usage: Hero elements stagger on load: tag(0ms) headline(150ms) subtitle(300ms) CTAs(450ms) visual(600ms). Each: opacity 0→1 translateY(30px→0) 600ms

name: section-scroll-reveal
usage: Every section uses IntersectionObserver(threshold 0.15). Headline reveals first then content staggers 100-150ms apart. opacity 0→1 translateY(30px→0)

name: parallax-product-visual
usage: Product mockups and hero visuals move at 0.3x scroll speed creating depth. Use CSS custom property --parallax-offset updated via rAF

name: clip-path-reveal
usage: Large visuals reveal via clip-path: inset(8% round 16px) → inset(0% round 16px) as element scrolls into view. 1s transition

name: svg-chart-draw
usage: SVG charts animate stroke-dasharray from 0 to full length creating a drawing effect. Triggered on scroll into view

name: number-count-up
usage: Numbers count from 0 to final value with ease-out cubic timing over 2s. Triggered by IntersectionObserver(threshold 0.5)

name: card-hover-lift
usage: Cards lift on hover: translateY(-4px) + box-shadow increase. transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25 0.1 0.25 1)

name: gradient-text-reveal
usage: Headlines use background: linear-gradient with background-clip: text. Gradient activates/sweeps when scrolled into view

name: reduced-motion-respect
usage: Always check prefers-reduced-motion. When active disable ALL decorative animation and show all content immediately

name: apple-standard-easing
usage: Apple's standard easing: cubic-bezier(0.25 0.1 0.25 1). Use for ALL transitions. Never use linear or ease-in-out

name: gpu-accelerated-only
usage: Only animate transform and opacity for 60fps performance. Never animate width height margin padding top left. Use will-change on animated elements
